message:
feat(cli): Update load.rs to use OutputFormat system

- Replaced all 7 robot_mode usages with output_format matching
- Added Plain and Tsv output variants for load command
- Added output_plain and output_tsv helper functions
- Updated auto-load, dry-run, and meta-skill output paths

Part of output format selection feature (meta_skill-hu66).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
